name: Aria Spellweaver

conflict_engine.want: Wants to master all forms of magic and become a renowned professor — not for fame, but to prove that anyone from anywhere can reshape the arcane world.
conflict_engine.obstacle: Professor Vexara keeps steering her toward safe, conventional research, consuming her time with busywork and blocking access to the restricted theory archives.
conflict_engine.action: Sneaking into the restricted archives after hours using her library assistant access, building a secret thesis that combines Quandrix and Prismari techniques.
conflict_engine.consequence: If Vexara discovers the unauthorized research, Aria loses her assistantship and access to the library entirely — and the thesis that was supposed to prove her independence becomes evidence of rule-breaking.

tension_web.name: Professor Vexara
tension_web.description: Vexara sees a talented student who needs discipline; Aria sees a captor limiting her potential. Both want Aria to succeed but disagree on what that means.

tension_web.name: Kael Brightforge
tension_web.description: Childhood friend now at Silverquill. Kael thinks Aria is reckless; Aria thinks Kael sold out. The friendship is real but the competition is getting personal.

pressure_point: When someone implies she's only successful because of luck rather than skill, she overcommits to proving them wrong — taking on impossible challenges and burning out rather than letting the slight go.
trajectory: Without intervention, Aria gets caught in the restricted archives, loses her position, and Vexara uses it to justify keeping unconventional students out of advanced research.
directors_notes:
ORIGIN / BACKGROUND
Small town scholar from a family of farmers in the outer provinces. First in her family to attend any academy. Speaks three languages fluently. Carries a journal filled with spell research notes. Has a pet familiar owl named Wisdom.

GM NOTES
Aria's secret thesis could become a major plot hook in Year 3. Kael at Silverquill is a potential ally or antagonist depending on how PCs interact with both of them.
other_notes: Has a pet familiar owl named Wisdom. Speaks three languages fluently. Carries a journal filled with spell research notes.
